title: Airtable vs Monday.com
description: Compare Airtable vs Monday.com in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Airtable emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.4/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Airtable and Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Airtable and Monday.com differ in pricing (Free–$45/user/mo vs $10–$20/seat/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Airtable cheaper than Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Airtable starts at Free–$45/user/mo while Monday.com starts at $10–$20/seat/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Airtable or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for project management. Airtable scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Airtable and Monday.com together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Airtable or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Both Airtable and Monday.com prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which project management tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Monday.com for large teams, while Airtable may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free–$45/user/mo pricing.
